summary: Verified all 5 bug fixes for RSA Tiles and ThermoSphere suppliers in admin panel. Both suppliers have products WITHOUT a `sku` field (only `supplier_code`). All fixes working: (1) Quick Edit save using _id-based lookup, (2) Add-to-database (Full Edit) using product_id, (3) Checkbox selection uniqueness via getProductKey helper, (4) Bulk operations using _id filter, (5) build_product_query helper for $or queries.

issues: data-testid attributes use product.sku which is null for RSA Tiles/ThermoSphere products - should use getProductKey() for consistency

critical_code_review_comments: Line 6415 in SupplierProducts.js: data-testid={`quick-edit-${product.sku}`} should use getProductKey(product) or product._id for products without sku
seed_data_creation: None - used existing RSA Tiles (28 products) and ThermoSphere (136 products) data
context_for_next_testing_agent: RSA Tiles and ThermoSphere suppliers have products with sku=null, only supplier_code present. Bug fixes use: (1) getProductKey(p) = supplier|||supplier_code for unique React keys, (2) _id-based MongoDB lookups in quick-update and add-to-database endpoints, (3) build_product_query() helper for $or queries on sku/supplier_code. All 28 RSA Tiles and 136 ThermoSphere products work correctly with Quick Edit, Full Edit, and checkbox selection.

backend_apis: ✓ GET /api/supplier-sync/products?supplier=RSA%20Tiles - returns 28 products with null sku
✓ GET /api/supplier-sync/products?supplier=ThermoSphere - returns 136 products with null sku
✓ PUT /api/supplier-sync/products/quick-update - works with product_id for RSA Tiles
✓ PUT /api/supplier-sync/products/quick-update - works with product_id for ThermoSphere
✓ POST /api/supplier-sync/products/add-to-database - works with product_id for RSA Tiles
✓ POST /api/supplier-sync/products/add-to-database - works with product_id for ThermoSphere
frontend_ui: ✓ RSA Tiles supplier tab shows 28 products
✓ Quick Edit modal opens for RSA Tiles product (Alanya Brown)
✓ Quick Edit modal opens for ThermoSphere product (Cable Kit 1.0m2 185W)
✓ Quick Edit save shows 'Product updated successfully' toast
✓ Full Edit navigates to /admin/products/edit/{id} for ThermoSphere product
bug_fixes_verified: ✓ BUG #1: Quick Edit save for RSA Tiles product using _id lookup
✓ BUG #2: Quick Edit save for ThermoSphere product using _id lookup
✓ BUG #3: Add-to-database endpoint works with product_id parameter
✓ BUG #4: Product keys are unique (supplier|||supplier_code format)
✓ BUG #5: Individual quick-update works for products without sku
